Item.Name: AddonConfig.Rules.2a493d2e-be15-2966-428d-2dd3ee9b96b3.Caption
Item.Value: Show "Error" text message in case the status is "Error"

Item.Name: AddonConfig.Rules.88376ecf-67f7-1075-342e-c4428dfa52ff.Caption
Item.Value: Show start/end date/time if collect stats between two date/times

Item.Name: AddonConfig.Rules.c77dd651-edb3-5a8d-7462-518d8c3c1487.Caption
Item.Value: Show end date/time if collect statistics until some date/time

Item.Name: AddonConfig.Rules.cfc0ca3d-480d-6e42-97a5-9dc0b84d256e.Caption
Item.Value: Show error description container in case of the "Error" status

Item.Name: AddonConfig.Rules.d8f28e38-9255-21ff-1c5f-59ce2f384b3e.Caption
Item.Value: Show "In progress" text message in case the status is "In progress"

Item.Name: AddonConfig.Rules.e50a35ee-69bc-10cf-26de-544a52ccfe1a.Caption
Item.Value: Show top 20 heavies requests in case the status is "Completed"

Item.Name: Caption
Item.Value: Statistics collect tasks form page (Business rules)
